data.body: Epic plan-review: PASS (signed, llm_ran). Triage of 17 advisories: (1) P5/G4 'siblings share decide.py + REVIEW_RESULT sidecar with no ordering edge' — resolved by landing as a DEPENDENCY-ORDERED stacked Gerrit change: #4 G5 -> #1 plan-impact (adds impact_fn to pass3_decide) -> #2 recall -> #5 thresholds -> #6 code-impact (reuses impact_fn) -> #7 nit/detector -> #8 data-capture -> #3 rollout. decide.py touched by #1 then #6 in that order; sidecar schema (impact_model_version + tier-tagged sub-answers) coordinated across #1/#6/#8/#3 so the extensions compose additively. (2) T11 'no versioning/migration for impact() change + new artifact' — addressed by #3's impact_model_version tag (version-segmented replay, refuses to pool old/new). (3) T3/G4 crit 'child6 PAT push confirmed working' + SSM-failure degradation — #8 implements the code+infra; the on-box PAT canary is an operational/deploy-time verification I cannot exercise from this worktree (noted as a deploy caveat, not a code gap). (4) E1/COH/G5 dedup/altitude nits — cosmetic; children are correctly parented + individually reviewable.
